title: IMPACT KINCARE - 211info
text: IMPACT NW SOUTHEAST MULTICULTURAL SENIOR CENTER IMPACT KINCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides monthly structured discussion groups, socialization opportunities, and educational programming about common issues for grandfamilies, which includes strategies for supporting relative children of all ages, abilities, and identities, specialized information and referral services with connections to community resources. 4610 SE Belmont Street Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: -Adults age 55 and older who are the primary caregivers for a relative child ages 0-17 -Related caregivers include blood, marriage, or adoption relatives, such as grandparents, aunts, uncles, sisters, brothers, cousins, and great-grandparents. Includes kith or fictive kin who have an emotionally significant relationship, characterized by the characteristics of a family relationship. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (971) 354-6562 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 354-6562 Call or Text Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or text to sign up for updates FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Kinship Navigator Programs Parenting Skills Classes * Kinship Caregivers Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - SENIOR SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM TRANSPORTATION - TRANSPORTATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IMPACT NW SOUTHEAST MULTICULTURAL SENIOR CENTER
